source_pr.title: server: fix column length when convert column info for tinyint
source_pr.body:
When column type is `tinyint`, [ao](https://sourcegraph.com/github.com/Kast0rTr0y/ao@189a44ab341e5d613ae9db0e98365688b80162ed/-/blob/activeobjects-core/src/net/java/ao/types/TypeManager.java#L258) checks both jdbc type and its precision in qualifiers. It needs precision in qualifiers to be 1 but tidb returned column's precision is 4(here precision is just column length). This PR fixes this. 

@zz-jason @XuHuaiyu PTAL and please check whether navicat has same behavior.

symptoms: - // But we found in race MySQL client, like Navicat for MySQL(version before 12) will truncate
failure_signature: - // But we found in race MySQL client, like Navicat for MySQL(version before 12) will truncate
fix_pattern: server: fix column length when convert column info for tinyint

evidence: evidence: - // But we found in race MySQL client, like Navicat for MySQL(version before 12) will truncate
